phases.name: Discovery
phases.objective: Surface current team friction and role-level constraints.
adaptationRules: If new workflow steps appear, attach them as sub-steps instead of replacing existing phases.
If priorities shift, re-rank bottlenecks but keep traceability to prior choices.

phases.name: Alignment
phases.objective: Create shared priorities and clear ownership.
adaptationRules: When stakeholders change, regenerate ownership map with minimal role disruption.
When deadlines compress, convert low-impact tasks to asynchronous actions.

phases.name: Execution Sprint
phases.objective: Run a 2-week sprint with explicit handoffs.
adaptationRules: If a blocker exceeds 24 hours, trigger an escalation micro-ritual.
If workload imbalance >20%, rebalance using strengths-fit assignments.

phases.name: Retrospective
phases.objective: Capture learning and propose workflow refinements.
adaptationRules: If a workflow change is approved, version it and track expected impact.
Carry forward only changes with clear owner and metric.

decisionGates.condition: Is team clarity score >= 7/10 after alignment?
decisionGates.ifFalse: Run a focused role-clarity workshop before execution.

decisionGates.condition: Did sprint achieve at least 80% committed outcomes?
decisionGates.ifTrue: Proceed to retrospective and scaling plan.
decisionGates.ifFalse: Run root-cause analysis and adjust sprint sizing assumptions.
